name: Sarama Resources Ltd.
description: Sarama Resources Ltd. is an exploration and development company primarily focused on the sourcing, acquisition, and advancement of gold deposits. The company specializes in establishing significant gold resource portfolios through the exploration of belt-scale projects. Headquartered in Subiaco, Australia, Sarama Resources is committed to unlocking value in its mineral properties, with a primary focus on its key projects in West Africa, including the Sanutura, Karankasso, and Koumandara projects. The company continues to engage in the exploration and development of these assets to build shareholder value within the mining sector.
